footer.brandTitle: Original design and ceramics, created by Florencia Álvarez
footer.brandText: Handmade production, functional pieces and a practice that unites design, craft and teaching experience.

seo.defaultTitle: FA Pottery Studio — Ceramics from a personal perspective
seo.defaultDescription: FA Pottery Studio by Florencia Alvarez. Handmade ceramics, classes and production in Málaga and Buenos Aires.

manifiesto.label: Manifesto
manifiesto.quote: A practice where every object reflects a way of looking, making and teaching ceramics.

marcaPersonal.heading: FA Pottery as a personal brand
marcaPersonal.text1: A space for work and exploration where every piece is born from direct contact with the material, time and process.
marcaPersonal.text2: From Argentina and Spain, developing a practice rooted in functional and contemporary ceramics, combining handmade production, limited series and one-of-a-kind pieces. Along with educational offerings and collaborations with workshops and cultural spaces.
marcaPersonal.feature1Desc: Pieces made by hand, in small series or as unique objects. Each piece keeps the traces of the process and the material.
marcaPersonal.feature2Desc: Wheel-throwing and hand-building classes in small groups, workshops and personalized classes for adults and children.
marcaPersonal.feature3Desc: Ceramic experiences for workshops, companies and cultural spaces. Custom projects and team building.

quienSoy.label: Who I am
quienSoy.heading: Craft, design and experience come together in every object
quienSoy.imgAlt: Portrait of Florencia Alvarez, ceramicist and designer
quienSoy.p1: I'm Florencia Alvarez, ceramicist and designer.
quienSoy.p2: My degree in Graphic Design and communication was redefined into a design-driven perspective that, over time, carried over into working with clay. Ceramics became my main medium of expression: a territory to think, make and produce from the material itself.
quienSoy.p3: I trained in wheel-throwing, hand-building and glaze development, and for more than four years I have taught ceramics classes for adults and children, guiding technical and creative processes with a close, personalized approach that respects each person's pace.
quienSoy.p4: I currently run handmade production and manage my studio as a space where practice coexists with functional pieces, limited series, teaching and collaborations with workshops, residencies and cultural spaces.

servicios.heading: What can you find at FA Pottery?
servicios.subtitle: Classes, pieces and ceramic experiences. All with a design perspective and a handmade process.

espacio.headingLine1: FA Pottery Studio is a space for art
espacio.img1Alt: Interior of the ceramics studio with a pottery wheel and pieces in progress
espacio.img2Alt: Detail of handmade ceramic pieces drying on a shelf
espacio.img3Alt: Workspace with ceramics tools and glazes

testimonios.label: Testimonials
testimonios.heading: What people who've had a ceramic experience with me are saying
testimonios.quote1: Classes with Florencia completely changed my relationship with ceramics. I had never dared to make anything before. The group had 6 people and the teaching was super personalized, and the space is amazing.
testimonios.context1: Regular classes student, Riviera, La Cala de Mijas
testimonios.quote2: We organized a ceramics workshop for our team and it was a beautiful experience. Flor has an incredible ability and patience to make everyone feel comfortable doing ceramics from the very first moment.
testimonios.quote3: My first time doing ceramics. I made a mug and a bowl, and every time I use them I feel there's something special about them. They're not perfect, but I love them!! I also bought a salad bowl and you can tell every piece is made with care and love. It's my favorite.
testimonios.context3: Customer and student of the Ceramics & Snacks Workshop, Maui Paddle Surf

propuestaEducativa.seoDescription: Wheel-throwing and hand-building ceramics classes. Small groups, workshops and personalized classes with Florencia Alvarez.
propuestaEducativa.heroAlt: Hands working clay in a ceramics workshop
propuestaEducativa.heading: Teaching is a fundamental part of my ceramic practice
propuestaEducativa.p1: I see learning as a process of technical and personal exploration, where each student develops their own connection with the material.
propuestaEducativa.p2: I have experience teaching ceramics, hand-building and wheel-throwing to adults and children, working from a personalized approach that respects each person's pace and is oriented toward both technique and creativity.
propuestaEducativa.p3Pre: I like to work in a practice that's open to exchange, because
propuestaEducativa.ctaBoxSubtitle: Small groups · All levels · From €35 / class
propuestaEducativa.type1Alt: Student working at the pottery wheel during a regular class
propuestaEducativa.type1P1: Ceramics classes on the pottery wheel and hand-building at the table, taught in my own workspace.
propuestaEducativa.type1P2: Groups are small to ensure close guidance, respecting each person's pace and process.
propuestaEducativa.type1P3: Classes combine technique, practice and observation of the material, and are aimed both at beginners and at those who wish to deepen their ceramic practice.
propuestaEducativa.type2Title: Workshops and classes at external venues (studios, companies and art centers)
propuestaEducativa.type2Alt: Group of people taking part in a ceramics workshop
propuestaEducativa.type2P1: Workshop proposals taught at host venues: studios, companies, ateliers and art centers.
propuestaEducativa.type2P2: Activities adapt to the context and audience of each venue, and can work as one-off experiences, training sessions or team building sessions, always focused on hands-on making and collective work.
propuestaEducativa.type3Title: Personalized classes (at your place or in my studio, individual or group)
propuestaEducativa.type3Alt: Personalized ceramics class session with one-on-one guidance
propuestaEducativa.type3P1: Classes designed to measure for people or groups looking for a more specific, personalized approach.
propuestaEducativa.type3P2: They can take place at your home or in the studio, and adapt to each participant's goals, level and pace, allowing them to go deeper into technique, process and personal development.

produccion.seoDescription: Functional and contemporary ceramic pieces, handmade on the wheel and by hand-building. Limited series and one-of-a-kind pieces.
produccion.heroAlt: Collection of handmade ceramic pieces in the studio
produccion.heading: FA Pottery's production focuses on functional and contemporary ceramics, handmade on the wheel and through hand-building techniques.
produccion.p1: I work with small series, limited editions and one-of-a-kind pieces, allowing each object to keep the traces of the process and the material. Variations between pieces aren't a flaw, but part of their identity.
produccion.p2: Each object is designed to be used, lived with and accompanied in everyday life.
produccion.cta: LET'S GIVE SHAPE TO YOUR IDEA!

colaboraciones.seoDescription: Collaborative ceramics projects. We work together to shape unique ideas with their own identity.
colaboraciones.experienciasHeading: A practice open to exchange and collective work
colaboraciones.qa1Title: Would you like to host me at your space?
colaboraciones.qa1Text: I'm interested in collaborating with workshops, studios and cultural spaces that value process, craft and experimentation.
colaboraciones.qa2Text: I'm available to develop joint projects, temporary residencies, educational proposals or collaborative production, both in local and international contexts.
colaboraciones.qa3Title: Want to bring ceramic activities to your space?
colaboraciones.qa3Text: If you have a space or project and want to explore a collaboration, I'd be happy to talk about it.
colaboraciones.imgAlt: Florencia Alvarez working in the ceramics studio
colaboraciones.p1: I believe in exchange as an essential part of the creative process.
colaboraciones.p2: I'm interested in working with people and spaces that value craft, learning and building projects together.
colaboraciones.p3: If you feel my practice can resonate with your space, I'd be delighted to talk and explore possibilities.
